turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i am good but my shoulders hurt . what about you ?

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: not bad , but since i have six toes on my left foot , it always hurts .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: is it because the extra toe doesn't fit inside your shoes ?

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: you got it , that is why i can not stand skiing . can not wear the boots .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: if i had a real dragon , i would totally train it . would you ?

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: definitely . i love dragons . wish i had one .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i like to do ink artwork of dragons , but i keep getting it on my shirts .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: hope it does not stain . i love reading . do you , if so what is your favorite book ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i like old 386 video games more , but i used to read michener .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: my favorite book i have read twice is twilight . i like old games too .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i have not read twilight yet but really want to . used to read black stallion .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i have not gotten to read lately because i broke my glasses .

turns.speaker: model_b

turns.content: yes , i have progressive lenses that's why they are still broke .
